creator: darius@holly.dons.net.au
text:
When I install the glade port and try and run it, I get 
[holly 1:10am] /usr/ports/devel/glade> glade
/usr/libexec/ld.so: Undefined symbol "__Xsetlocale" called from glade:/usr/X11R6/lib/libgdk11.so.1.3 at 0x2019530c

I have tried removing GTK and rebuilding, but I get the same results..

How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/devel/glade
make install
/usr/X11R6/bin/glade
